items.label: storefront-dev
messages: Now I have the full spec. Let me explore the existing codebase to understand patterns before implementing.
Files already exist. Let me check their content to see if they're stubs or actual implementations.
The implementation is already in place! Let me validate it works by running the tests and dev server.
All 26 tests pass. Now let me validate the dev server can compile and serve the app correctly.
Dev server returns HTTP 200 — all modules resolve correctly. Let me also do the SSR safety checks and verify validation hooks.
All safety checks pass. Let me check if there's a validate-app.sh hook file to update, and verify there are no existing e2e tests that need attention.
Everything validates. The feature doesn't add new routes (Quick View is a modal on existing PLP pages), so no validate-app.sh update is needed. Let me commit and complete the pipeline.

The **storefront-dev** phase for **product-quick-view** is complete. Here's a summary:  ## Implementation Summary  ### Files Delivered (4 files) | File | Description | |---|---| | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.jsx` | ProductTile override — wraps base tile with Quick View overlay bar (slide-up on desktop hover, always visible on mobile) | | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.test.js` | 12 unit tests covering overlay bar rendering, interaction (click/preventDefault/stopPropagation), corner cases (sets/bundles/missing ID), and accessibility | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.jsx` | QuickViewModal — Chakra Modal with loading spinner, error state, and ProductView integration via `useProductViewModal` hook | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.test.js` | 14 unit tests covering modal shell, content rendering, aria-labels, error state, and keyboard accessibility |  ### Verification Results - ✅ **26/26 unit tests passing** (100% statement/line coverage) - ✅ **Dev server HTTP 200** — webpack resolves all modules correctly - ✅ **SSR safe** — no `window`/`document` access, no `Date.now()`/`Math.random()` - ✅ **E2E safe** — no `networkidle` patterns - ✅ All `data-testid` attributes in place for SDET agent  ### Key Design Decisions - Reused existing `useProductViewModal` hook and `ProductView` component (DRY) - Full-width semi-transparent overlay bar with slide-up animation (per spec mockup) - Responsive: `opacity: {base: 1, lg: 0}` ensures mobile touch accessibility - Error boundary pattern with `quick-view-error` test ID for three-outcome E2E assertions - Sets/bundles excluded from Quick View (out of scope for v1)

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && npm start & ↵ SERVER_PID=$! ↵ echo "Server PID: $SERVER_PID" ↵ sleep 60 ↵ HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000

# SSR safety: check for window/document access without guards ↵ grep -n 'window\.' /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.jsx /workspaces/DAGent-
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh all "feat(storefront): add product quick view modal with overlay bar on product tiles"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view storefront-dev
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark storefront-dev complete for product-quick-view"

items.label: storefront-unit-test
messages: Now I have a thorough understanding of the spec. Let me explore the actual source files and test infrastructure.
Let me read the source files and existing test stubs:
Good, I have a clear picture. Both source files and test stubs already exist. Let me run the tests to see their current status:

All 26 tests pass across both test suites with excellent coverage (100% statements, 100% functions, 100% lines). The branch coverage is 88.88% overall — the uncovered branch is line 28 in product-tile (the `product?.name` fallback in `productName`).  Let me check the spec more carefully against what's tested. The spec calls for specific tests I should verify are all covered:

The tests cover most spec requirements but I notice a few gaps: 1. **QuickViewModal**: Missing test for `imageSize="sm"` prop passing (#12 from spec) 2. **ProductTile**: Missing style assertion tests (#12, #13 from spec) and the `product.name` fallback (line 28 branch)  Let me add the missing tests to achieve complete spec coverage:
Now let me add the missing product-tile tests (style assertions and `product.name` fallback):
Now let me run the full test suite to verify everything passes:
All 32 tests pass with **100% coverage across all metrics** (statements, branches, functions, lines). Now let me commit and complete the pipeline:

The storefront-unit-test phase is complete. Here's a summary:  ## Summary  ### Tests Written: 32 (all passing)  **QuickViewModal** (`quick-view-modal/index.test.js`) — 16 tests: - Modal shell: loading spinner, ProductView render, data-testid, aria-label, closed state, close button, error/unavailable state - Content integration: product data passing, "View Full Details" link, Add to Cart button, `showFullLink={true}`, `isProductLoading` forwarding - Accessibility: Escape key closes modal, aria-label fallback for missing product name - Prop verification: `imageSize="sm"` passed correctly, all props verified together  **ProductTile Override** (`product-tile/index.test.js`) — 16 tests: - Overlay bar rendering: standard product, eye icon + text, correct aria-label - Product type filtering: sets hidden, bundles hidden, missing productId hidden - Prop forwarding: all props passed to base ProductTile - Interaction: click opens modal, preventDefault called, stopPropagation called, modal close - Visual/structural: `role="group"` container, name fallbacks, empty name fallback, semantic `<button>` element - Base component: renders correctly inside wrapper  ### Coverage: **100%** across all files | Metric | Coverage | |--------|----------| | Statements | 100% | | Branches | 100% | | Functions | 100% | | Lines | 100% |

shellCommands.command: cat > /tmp/patch_qvm.py << 'PYEOF' ↵ import re ↵ filepath = '/workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.test.js' ↵ with open(filepath, 'r') as f: ↵ c

cat >> /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.test.js << 'EOF' ↵ // --- Additional spec coverage --- ↵ test('overlay bar uses product.name as fallbac

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh all "test(storefront): add unit tests for product-quick-view feature ↵ - QuickViewModal: 16 tests covering modal shell, content
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view storefront-unit-test 2>&1
